sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n91661" key="puriath/r" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πῠρι-ᾱτήρ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ῆρος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n91661.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">hot-water bottle</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">warming-pan</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:2:10" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.10</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
